classic-tarot-v1.description: 1900s mystical lithography with bold ink outlines and anthropomorphic leopard cat characters.
classic-tarot-v1.technical_prefix: [TECHNICAL: Aspect Ratio 2:3 Vertical, Edge-to-Edge Continuous, NO TEXT, NO BORDERS]
classic-tarot-v1.style_baseline: Traditional mystical illustration in the style of 1900s lithography, with clean bold black ink outlines. FULL BLEED: Image content (trees, rocks, sky) MUST touch all four physical edges of the 2:3 image. ABSOLUTELY NO WHITE MARGINS, NO VINTAGE PAPER BORDERS, NO MATTED EDGES. ABSOLUTELY NO TEXT, NO LABELS, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS IN THE ARTWORK.
classic-tarot-v1.character_baseline: STRICTLY ANTHROPOMORPHIC. The subject is a Taiwan leopard cat standing upright on two legs with human-like posture and proportions. It MUST wear clothing or robes. Essential markers: white spots on back of black ears, white forehead stripes, and rosette leopard cat fur patterns. NO FOUR-LEGGED ANIMAL POSTURE.
classic-tarot-v1.composition_baseline: Center-weighted anthropomorphic character. Ensure a 'breathing zone' (clean atmospheric background) at the extreme top and bottom 15% to allow for project UI overlays. Forest/sky must fill this zone completely to the edge.

poker-card-v1.description: Modern flat comic style for playing cards (Future placeholder).
